description: Cognitive load: Miller's 7 plus/minus 2 rule. More items cause decision paralysis.
Universal web convention. Users expect it. Not having it causes confusion.
Users must know where they are. Active state gives orientation.
check_method: Check active/current class on nav item

rule: Mobile hamburger menu with clear close action
description: Hamburger is accepted on mobile. Must have obvious X to close.
Reduces scroll-to-navigate effort. Especially important on long pages.
check_method: Scroll and verify nav stays visible

description: Content-heavy sites need fast search access.
check_method: Navigate to search from any page

description: Multiple competing CTAs reduce conversion. One clear action per view.
Use verbs: 'Get Started' not 'Submit'. Describes outcome not action.
Button must visually pop. Minimum 3:1 contrast with background.

rule: CTA above the fold on landing pages
description: First viewport must contain primary action. Users may not scroll.
Phone/email/form should be immediately accessible.
check_method: Check header or hero for contact

description: Testimonials or trust badges near action buttons increase conversion.

rule: Max 5 visible fields per form step
description: Fewer fields = higher completion rate. Multi-step for complex forms.
Placeholder-only labels disappear on focus causing confusion.
check_method: Check if labels persist on focus

rule: Inline validation with clear error messages
description: Errors shown at field level immediately. No page-reload validation.
check_method: Enter invalid data and check response

description: Use asterisk or explicit text. Don't make users guess.
Reduces click-to-type friction on dedicated form pages.
check_method: Tab into page and check focus

description: Prevents error submissions. Combined with inline validation.
check_method: Fill partial form and check button state

description: Users need to know their action worked. Show clear confirmation.
SEO and accessibility requirement. Never skip heading levels.
Optimal reading line length. Too wide = hard to track. Use max-w-prose.

rule: Scannable text with subheadings every 300 words
description: Users scan not read. Break walls of text with clear subheadings.
Accessibility and SEO requirement. Descriptive not decorative.
check_method: Check img elements for alt attributes

description: Placeholder text in production is unprofessional and damages trust.
check_method: Search for 'lorem ipsum' in rendered page

description: Mixed formal/casual tone confuses brand perception.
check_method: Read key pages for tone consistency

description: WCAG AA requirement. Non-negotiable for body text.
check_method: Run contrast checker on all text

rule: Color contrast minimum 3:1 for large text and UI
description: WCAG AA for text 24px+ and UI components like buttons.
check_method: Check large text and button contrast

description: Tab through entire page. Every button/link/input must be reachable.

rule: Focus indicators visible on all interactive elements
description: Focus ring must be visible. Never use outline-none without replacement.
Screen reader users need to bypass navigation on every page.
check_method: Tab first element and check for skip link

description: Buttons with only icons need aria-label for screen readers.

rule: Reduced motion media query for animations
description: Users with motion sensitivity need animations disabled.
Apple/Google guideline. Smaller targets cause tap errors.
Horizontal overflow breaks mobile layouts completely.

rule: Font size minimum 16px on mobile inputs
description: iOS zooms in on inputs below 16px which breaks layout.
Bottom of screen is easiest to reach. Primary actions should be there.
check_method: Check CTA positions for thumb reach

description: Mobile has no hover. All hover-triggered content needs tap alternative.
check_method: Test all hover interactions on touch

description: Serve right image size per viewport. No 2000px images on mobile.

rule: Physical address and legal info visible
description: Legal requirement in many countries. Imprint/privacy in footer.
No excuse for non-HTTPS in 2026. Browsers warn on HTTP.
check_method: Check URL bar for lock icon

description: Custom error pages maintain trust. Default server errors look broken.
Same colors/fonts/logo placement everywhere. Inconsistency = unprofessional.
Users need feedback that something is happening. No frozen UI.
check_method: Trigger async action and check for spinner/skeleton

description: Broken resources destroy credibility instantly.
check_method: Run link checker or manual scan

description: Core Web Vital. Google ranking factor. User patience threshold.
Core Web Vital. Layout shifts frustrate users and hurt rankings.
30-50% smaller than JPEG/PNG. No reason not to in 2026.
Prevent FOUT (flash of unstyled text) on first paint.
check_method: Check link preload for font files

description: Defer non-critical JS/CSS. Critical CSS inline if needed.
check_method: Check network waterfall for blocking resources

description: Only load images when approaching viewport. Save bandwidth.
Most important content biggest/boldest. Guide user attention.
check_method: Squint test: what stands out first?

rule: Consistent spacing from design system scale
description: No arbitrary padding/margin values. Use spacing scale.

rule: Maximum content width with centered layout
description: Text blocks max 65-75ch width. Full-width text is unreadable.
Breathing room between sections. Cramped = cheap looking.
Elements should align to invisible grid. Random offsets look amateur.

rule: Hover states on all clickable elements
description: Cursor change + visual feedback. Users must know what is clickable.
Too fast = jarring. Too slow = sluggish. Sweet spot is 200ms.
smooth-scroll for anchor links. Not for general page scroll.
check_method: Click anchor links and check scroll

description: Extremely annoying. Browsers block it anyway. Never do this.
Every click/tap needs immediate visual response. No dead clicks.
check_method: Click buttons and measure response time

rule: Testimonials with real names and photos
description: Anonymous reviews feel fake. Real attribution builds credibility.
check_method: Check testimonials for names and images

description: Unexpected costs at checkout cause abandonment. Be transparent.

rule: Bottom sheet menus for mobile actions
description: Bottom sheets are more thumb-friendly than dropdown menus on mobile.
check_method: Check action menus on mobile viewport

rule: Meaningful link text not click here
description: Screen readers and SEO need descriptive link text.
check_method: Search for generic link text patterns

rule: Error messages explain how to fix the problem
description: Not just what went wrong but what to do about it.
Screen readers need lang attribute to pronounce correctly.
check_method: Check html element for lang attribute

description: Every input needs a label element or aria-label. Click label to focus.
check_method: Click labels and check focus behavior

rule: Total page weight under 1.5MB on initial load
description: Heavy pages lose mobile users. Optimize assets aggressively.
check_method: Check total transfer size in DevTools

rule: Z-index values follow a defined scale
description: Random z-index leads to stacking bugs. Use a scale: 10 20 30 40 50.
Capture leaving users with relevant offer. Not intrusive popups.
check_method: Scroll 75% or move to close tab

description: Disabled elements must look different from active ones. opacity-50 + cursor-not-allowed.
